ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voting_machines" INTEGER /* Number of voting machines in the precinct */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the precinct */,
  "geographic_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the precinct (WKT string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., Federal, State, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the office */,
  "term_length_years" INTEGER /* Term length for the office in years */,
  "next_election_year" INTEGER /* Next election year for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of the district (e.g., Congressional, State Senate, State House) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "geographic_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the district (WKT string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate is running for (nullable for non-districted offices) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the party (file path or URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office for which the votes were cast */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district for which the votes were cast (nullable for non-districted offices) */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate for whom the votes were cast */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party for whom the votes were cast */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "is_provisional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result is provisional */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
